transcript.text:
(A very well-known superstar of the day...) I'm sure everyone has seen this franchise at some point on the delivery apps
(Nak*) *Baby octopus
(Gop*) *Beef intestines
(Sae*) *Shrimp
(This isn't just any Nakgopsae. It's 'Kookmin Nakgopsae'!!)
(There exist those who haven't tried them yet...and those who have tried more than once...)
(Incredible taste!!) So good
(I'll give you a thumbs up)
(Another one)
(A third one)
(Even a fourth)
(This isn't the end yet!)
(Beef intestines hotpot with an amazing presentation!)
(All the thumbs-up you've given me...)
(Right back at you...haha)
(Let's dig into the meet-up between the professional thumbs-up collector, 'Kookmin Nakgopsae')

(and 'Tzuyang'...!)
Hi, everyone
What I'm eating today is
(Today's mukbang: Nakgopsae!) 'Nakgopsae'
I've heard that Nakgopsae has long been a regional dish in Busan
I'm not exaggerating by saying that this franchise
(The first place that pops up in my head if I think of 'Nakgopsae'!!) has promoted this particular dish all throughout the nation
I've had deliveries from this franchise several times,
(The go-to place for Nakgopsae that makes her heart pound!) but it's my first time eating at the restaurant
I'm so excited right now
(Location: 'Kookmin Nakgopsae' in Mangpo, Suwon)
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
(Please introduce yourself) I'm the brand representative
of 'Kookmin Nakgopsae'
And he is the manager
of this 'Kookmin Nakgopsae' location at Mangpo

Hello
- It's an honor - No, it's my honor
Is this your first time advertising?
Yes, it's our very first ad
It's our first time to advertise ourselves in 5 years
Wow, how are you already so well-known when you've never advertised?
I had Nakgopsae in Busan first,
and wanted to try again in my area, but there was none
(A flavor that I thought deserved to be recognized nationwide) Since I wanted everyone in our nation to try it,
(Hence, the establishment of 'Kookmin* Nakgopsae') I decided to name my brand, 'Kookmin* Nakgopsae') *National people
(Honorable first ad, let's get it!) It's our first ad, so I'll do my best
(Engrave in your memory: 'Kookmin Nakgopsae'!) I appreciate it
Thank you
(The menu!) Thank you
I'm here for Nakgopsae, but...
(Of course, the hottest menu is 'Nakgopsae'!) Our most popular dish is Nakgopsae,

then in the order of beef small intestines Nakgopsae, mala Nakgopsae,
and beef small intestines hotpot
(Korean beef large intestines Nakgopsae) Since it's the signature menu, one Nakgopsae,
one beef small intestines Nakgopsae,
and one mala Nakgopsae with the additional topping of beef belly
- Beef belly? - Yes, please
Got it
(Order complete) Yes, thank you
Thank you
(The reason for the name 'Kookmin' in front of Nakgopsae)
(Loaded with fresh ingredients)
(The large intestines are at another level...)
(Korean beef intestines are butchered and cooked on the same day...!!)
(Carefully plating the most premium ingredients)
(And pouring the secret spicy sauce!)
(Mala, which adds the numbing heat flavor!)

('Kookmin Nakgopsae' is ready to be served)
(Directly to Tzuyang!)
- This is mala Nakgopsae - Looks awesome
And this is the signature Nakgopsae
Nakgopsae
And the beef small intestines Nakgopsae is coming out next
(Serving done) Wow, look at this
(How neat and organized!) The presentation is so neat. So pretty
This is Korean beef large intestines Nakgopsae
and beef small intestines Nakgopsae
Mala Nakgopsae
Do they come without broth?
I have a question
Do they boil without broth?
Yup! Our Nakgopsae has
veggies that will release moisture as they boil,

so the bottom of the pot won't burn
If you want more broth,
you can try boiling with the cover on, so the moisture is contained
(Trying the mala Nakgopsae with more broth!) Thank you
Umm and...
we have plum juice for you hehe
(How thoughtful...) Let me know if you need some
Thank you so much
What I thought was so interesting when I ordered from here on the delivery app
was the aluminum eco-friendly disposable pot
Because the food came in these pots,
(Super convenient, 'Kookmin Nakgopsae'!) it was really easy to heat up before eating
It got stuck in my memory
(If you order non-cooked and heat it up,) I prefer heating up my food while I'm eating,
(it's even more enjoyable...!) so I liked the fact that it came with the disposable heatable pot
Woah, there's so much broth now

I thought it would burn and stick to the bottom
(The broth is ready...!)
(Slurp) It looks so good
(Lifting the cover of mala Nakgopsae!) When the large intestines are cooked, they turn over like flowers
- I have a personal question... - Yeah?
When you eat,
you never put on an apron
(Ca...caught...haha) You're right
(Clothes get stains of self-confidence...) I don't like the apron-look
(Beef bellies in)
(A bit of waiting for the beef bellies with the cover on!)
(Korean beef large intestines Nakgopsae, beef small intestines Nakgopsae are ready!) You can eat now
I can? Thank you
(A big bowl of rice to eat together!) Your big bowl of rice is here
Thank you
Such a big bowl

Look at this
Bon appetit!
I'm so ready for this
(Korean beef large intestines first!) Large! Intestines!
So good
The sauce is
slightly spicy for anyone's tolerance
(The flavor that would hit the spot for everyone!) and so delicious
(These large intestines...) The intestines are so nutty
(Mala Nakgopsae with beef belly is also ready!)
Typically, large intestines are a hit or a miss,
but if they are cooked and soaked in sauce like this,
they aren't that greasy
Instead, it brings out the nuttiness
It's delicious
It says if you eat

sesame leaves, mayonnaise, and pickled radish together with Nakgopsae,
(A burst of flavors with these four) it's even better
Sesame leaf
Baby octopus
(Large intestine)
Shrimp
Mayonnaise
(She's even adding tobiko...)
(Thumbs up)
(The taste that deserves two thumbs-up...!)
So yummy
(Welcome to Nakgopsae party!) It's a party in my mouth
I love the combination with mayo
(Surprise! Plum juice) How do you like it so far?
It's actually prune juice
Thank you

Starch noodles look good, too
Oh my gosh
The sauce...!
Anyone would love it
The octopus
pops like an explosion of juice
(A mouthful of baby octopus...!) It's so chewy and juicy
(This is why Nakgopsae is popular...!) Wow it's good
I gotta try the other ones, too,
(This is too good to stop...heh) but I'm so into this one, oh no
(Rice cake!) There's rice cake in here
What's so amazing about this franchise is that
on the delivery apps,
the average rating of a total of 100 locations is,
was it 4.98? Yeah, it's 4.98
(Incredible rating...!) It's impressive

This is a taste that anybody would enjoy,
(Totally agreeable) so I understand how they got such a high rating
Tasty
I'm ready to finish this, but I have these other ones to try
(Forgot to put in pickled radish before!) Adding pickled radish here is a heavenly combination?
(Pickled radish)
(Another thumbs-up)
Wait
(Finally moving on!) I'll try the other dishes as well
(Beef small intestines in place of Korean beef large intestines!) This one is beef small intestines Nakgopsae
In fact, I prefer small intestines to large intestines
But these large intestines were so good...
Let's see about the small intestines
(No need to doubt - they're full of mucosa...!) Wow, see how it's full of mucosa
Full of it
(Before so, the steamed egg custard is served) Wow...the egg custard

(What an amazing-looking egg custard!) Woah, what is this
It looks so fluffy! Thank you
Usually, these Pompei egg curstards tend to be
a little dense in the texture
(I'm fluffy) It's so fluffy
Weird
Cute
(Automatic thumbs-up)
If you order Nakgopsae, the egg custard is on the house...
(On the house, with this quality!!??) Really?
Only at the restaurant?
Only at the restaurant
(Egg custard...restaurant...taking notes...) That's crazy
It's so good
You already finished one?!
(There's some left in here...hehe) Hmm? No, not yet

(Still shes's super fast...haha)
This egg custard just melts in my mouth
Slurp!
(I want...to know you...) How did they do it? I wanna make this at home
(Sending an SOS to the brand rep) Can you tell me?
It's a secret haha
(Not telling ya)
The small intestines are good, too
This time
(With a sesame leaf like before!) in a sesame leaf...
(Pickled radish for wrapping)
(Stacking on top of picked radish...!) This has gotta be good, too
(Wow...)
Wow! The egg...!
(This is so cool...)
(Two different 'wow's in one setting)

Should I go for the rice this time?
Mix mix
With rice
(Last but not least, mala Nakgopsae!) Should I try the mala broth?
(The color red that represents mala) I'm seeing the mala oil
This is totally mala
Woah, the flavor is completely different..!!
This is authentic mala!!
Dang, it's spicy
(Warning: Spicy) It's definitely spicier
(Where would I be without this plum juice? hehe)
But they balanced it really well
(Everyone would enjoy) The fragrance of mala is prominent,
(the proper balance of mala flavor!) but it's not too strong
It's perfectly balanced
(He's been listening hehe) Thank you

If the taste of mala is too strong,
there would be customers who wouldn't like it
So in order to balance the tastes of Nakgopsae and mala,
(The recipe was developed for 6 months!) I strained myself for 6 months
Yes, I customized the mala sauce
(The origin story of mala Nakgopsae) to suit the Nakgopsae perfectly
It's so delicious...
The seasoning is
quite strong, for sure,
but it's not chalky or salty in my mouth
(The signature Nakgopsae is almost done) Yummy
(Get all and mix!) Get 'em all~
(The signature Nakgopsae, CLEARED!)
(Tzuyang wanted to heat up mala Nakgopsae...)
(4 pieces of rice cake at once...) These rice cakes are chewy and nice
(So hot!!)

(She chomps everything and anything tasty...haha) I think I just died a little
Yummy
It's my first time eating mala Nakgopsae,
but it was so much more delicious than my expectation
(Devour mode ON)
(WOW...)
You're amazing
(He's good with one dish) I get so full when I finish one dish
Ah, by the way,
(Eyeing on the hotpot menus) there's also hotpots?
Yup! They're part of our beef small intestines menu,
(Beef small intestines hotpot menu) with the beef bone broth
(All-in-one intestines hotpot, beef intestines hotpot, beef belly hotpot and sauces
(Popular, even!) They're in fact very popular
(How's that possble...?) Oh? Then I should try one
Wait, you're eating more after all this?!

(Holy...)
Will you make one for me, please?
Then... Yes, will do
Yes, thank you
(Oh, right!!)
Do you put in crown daisies and what not?
Crown daisies and water parsley!
Should I take them out?
Thank you
(While she builds up to further enjoy the coming hotpot...)
(Laying out the veggies first, like the starting point of Nakgopsae)
(Stacking up mushrooms, flour dough, sesame leaf)
(And finally the beef small intestines!)
(Beef small intestines hotpot is ready!)
Here it is
OMG

(Such a generous amount of food for a medium!) What size is this?
Uhh...This is medium
But I added more intestines for you
(When it's just about to boil up, the beef belly)
(and the dipping sauces are served!) Perilla seed powder and hot chilli powder. You can customize to your own liking
- Hope you like it - Thank you!
(Waiting while it cooks...) Rice cake...
(Beef small intestines Nakgopsae, CLEARED!)
How would you like the intestines to be cut?
That's perfect!
- Like this? - Yes
- Beef bellies in right away? - Yes, please!
(An explosion of ingredients...)
Looks delicious
(Hotpot is ready) Look at the color. It has to be good
Bon appetit!

Soju!!
Bring me soju!!!!
(Tzu-runkard cries today as well....) I'm so craving soju right now
This is so spicy
(One bite calls for a shot of soju) that if I take a spoonful of this after a shot of soju,
(Spicy and rich hotpot flavor...!) I think I'd be unstoppable
Wow amazing
I can feel the beefiness of the bone broth
In addition to the rich bone broth,
(There's just the right amount of spice) there is spiciness
(Eating as if she's enchanted...)
It's so good
(Even the flour dough is amazing...!) There's also handpulled flour dough
The broth keeps getting better and better
(Props to you...) The hotpot is also an excellent grub
The broth is so good, since it's real beef bone soup

Nice nice
I think what you just ate
is about 2kg,
which is a lot of food...haha
(Hotpot sauce!) Oh wait, there was soy sauce
Good
It's so good
(Beef belly right into the dipping sauce...!) It should be good with the beef belly, too
Sometimes, when I'm eating broth dishes like this,
(Instead of coffee...lol) I wanna bring it around with me in a tumbler
Wow, the broth is so rich...!
WOOOOOOOOW
Three dishes of Nakgopsae, CLEARED
A whole hotpot, CLEARED
What I saw on YouTube
(Real fact) was true...

(I'm a carnivore, so I left some veggies...) Not a fan of veggies, so...
these are the leftovers
I'm more than overwhelmed that
you finished everything
No, I'm very grateful and overwhelmed that everything was so delicious
(Applause)
But you look like someone...
(Could it be Jo Jeong-seok...???) Yanadoo...
Jo Jeong-seok?!?!
(Tzuyang, please...) No, please don't say that
(LOLOL)
(Survival tactic at max level) I see it too!
(He's satisfied...!) Thank you
For real though, the Nakgopsaes and the hotpot were
undeniably good, really
(Applaud) Applause~

(Survival tactic at max level 22)
(Last stretch...)
Honestly,
the broth is amazing
First of all, the ingredients were fresh
and the sauce and the broth were delicious
Overall, it was a pure perfection from start to finish
Thank you
for the food!
(Brand rep is bringing something after the filming is over) I want to give you these for to-go
- Wow, for to-go? - Yes
(Another two servings of Nakgopsae?) For me?
- Thank you so much - This one is
(Take-out Nakgopsae and hotpot...!) the hotpot you just had
- and the Nakgopsae - Nakgopsae!
These are disposable eco-friendly containers

From Seoul, Daejeon, Daegu, Busan, Gimhae, to Haenam,
you can try 'Kookmin Nakgopsae'
Thank you for your interest!
('Kookmin Nakgopsae,' fighting...!) Awkward...
